Bread.description: A piece of bread, chrupiący type

Kaczka_al_dente.description: Duck almost ready to be eaten

Sandwich.description: A sandwich for a hungry Staszek

Nails.name: Nails
Nails.description: A pack of nails, hammer not included

Cart Wheel.description: Finally, a wheel for your cart!

Service gun.name: Service gun
Service gun.description: It's your gun, and responsibility. Also fully loaded

Empty Service gun.name: Empty service gun
Empty Service gun.description: Gun without an ammunition is good as paperweigh. At least can be more intimidating.

Dissapointment as a weapon.name: Dissapointment as a weapon
Dissapointment as a weapon.description: Urge to look into loaded barrel is heavy and tempting

Bleach.name: Bleach
Bleach.description: A bottle of bleach, strong chemical for cleaning

Small glass bottle.name: Small glass bottle
Small glass bottle.description: The smaller the bottle, the heavier the shame of hiding it.

Chlorine grenade.name: Chlorine grenade
Chlorine grenade.description: A makeshift grenade filled with chlorine gas. Let's fuck up this guy.

Kitchen knife.name: Kitchen knife
Kitchen knife.description: Still quite sharp. Smell of chopped garlic merged permanently into the blade.

Bourbon.name: Bourbon
Bourbon.description: A freshly opened bottle feels like an ocean of something better. Sadly, it's full of wrecked hopes.

Bottle of regret.name: Bottle of regret
Bottle of regret.description: Burns just as much as the naked, ring finger. A toast to the future that never happened.

Socks.name: Socks
Socks.description: A pair of dirty socks, not the most fashionable one, but they do the job.

Confetti.name: Confetti shooter
Confetti.description: Perfect to celebrate birthday of your 10 year old cousin who doesn't like you.

Car Battery.name: Car battery
Car Battery.description: A heavy car battery. Unfortunately, the cables are missing, so you can't just rush 'em now... or in a moment.

Duck tape.name: Duck tape
Duck tape.description: Answer to the question - It moves, but it shouldn't?

Can.name: Can
Can.description: A can without a label, feels heavy

Empty can.name: Empty can
Empty can.description: Still smells like rotten meat from the inside

Weird banana.name: Weird banana
Weird banana.description: It is mutated, haunted or just a strange

Hair spray.name: Hair spray
Hair spray.description: A can of hair spray, you used it many times in last decade

Lighter.name: Lighter
Lighter.description: The most dangerous element within your pocket's reach. Almost empty.

Molotov cocktail.name: Molotov cocktail
Molotov cocktail.description: Drink for a very unwelcome guests

Molotov cocktail (sock version).name: Molotov cocktail (sock version)
Molotov cocktail (sock version).description: Looks kinda hilarious, but will work

Scraps of cloth.name: Scraps of cloth
Scraps of cloth.description: Strips of material, waiting for a purpose

Old clothes.name: Old clothes
Old clothes.description: A pile of old clothes, most in your size

Broom.name: Broom
Broom.description: Used to clean your house, in any way possible

Makeshift spear.name: Makeshift spear
Makeshift spear.description: A spear made from a broom and a kitchen knife. Ancient ancestors would be proud.

Sock flail.name: Sock flail
Sock flail.description: A flail made from a socks and a can. Looks bad, and it hurt as much

Pen.name: Pen
Pen.description: As they say, it is mightier than a sword. Though, you'd trade it for a real blade in a heartbeat.

Crowbar.name: Crowbar
Crowbar.description: Break into places where you're not wanted
